name: mission_objectives
description: Mission Objectives (Core Rules pp.89-91). Three separate D10 tables by mission type. Quest finale is always FIGHT_OFF with +1 enemy.

MOVE_THROUGH.name: Move Through
MOVE_THROUGH.description: At least 2 crew members must exit from the opposite battlefield edge. Driving off all enemies also counts as a Win if at least 2 crew remain.
MOVE_THROUGH.placement_rules: Deploy on one edge, must reach opposite edge.
MOVE_THROUGH.victory_condition: At least 2 crew members exit from the opposite table edge, OR drive off all enemies with at least 2 crew remaining.

DELIVER.name: Deliver
DELIVER.description: One crew member carries a package to the table center. Costs a Combat Action to place. If the carrier becomes a casualty, roll 1D6: on 1 the package is destroyed, otherwise another crew can pick it up with a Combat Action. Drive off all enemies with package undamaged also counts as a Win.
DELIVER.placement_rules: Assign one crew member the delivery package. Drop point at table center.
DELIVER.victory_condition: Place the package at table center (Combat Action), OR drive off all enemies with package undamaged.

ACCESS.name: Access
ACCESS.description: Reach a computer console at the center of the battlefield and gain access. Roll 1D6+Savvy, scoring 6+ to succeed. Costs a Combat Action per attempt, up to 2 characters per round. Soulless within 6 inches. Engineer/Bot add +1. A natural 1 means the system is hardened; a second natural 1 means total failure. Engineers ignore natural 1s.
ACCESS.placement_rules: Console placed at exact table center.

PATROL.name: Patrol
PATROL.description: Select 3 large terrain features at random. A crew member must end a move within 2 inches of each feature to check it. All 3 checked means a Win.
PATROL.placement_rules: Select 3 large terrain features at random as patrol points.
PATROL.victory_condition: All 3 patrol points checked (crew member ends move within 2 inches of each).

FIGHT_OFF.name: Fight Off
FIGHT_OFF.description: No objective beyond driving off the enemy. Win by Holding the Field. Quest finale always uses this objective with +1 enemy.
FIGHT_OFF.placement_rules: Standard deployment zones on opposite edges.
FIGHT_OFF.victory_condition: Hold the Field (drive off or eliminate all enemies).

SEARCH.name: Search
SEARCH.description: Place a token on each medium and large terrain feature. A character in contact can search as a Combat Action by rolling 1D6: on 5+ the item is found and the mission is Won. If all locations fail, the mission cannot be Won.
SEARCH.placement_rules: Token on each medium/large terrain feature.
SEARCH.victory_condition: Find the item by searching (1D6, 5+ per location). If all fail, mission cannot be Won.

DEFEND.name: Defend
DEFEND.description: Win by Holding the Field. If enemy AI would normally be Cautious, Defensive, or Tactical, change it to Aggressive. Add +1 to enemy numbers.
DEFEND.placement_rules: Standard deployment. Enemy AI forced to Aggressive.
DEFEND.victory_condition: Hold the Field. Enemy AI changed to Aggressive, +1 enemy numbers.

ACQUIRE.name: Acquire
ACQUIRE.description: An item is located at the table center. Move into contact to grab it, spending a Combat Action, then exit the table from your edge. If the carrier becomes a casualty, roll 1D6: on 1 the item is destroyed, otherwise it can be picked up with a Combat Action.
ACQUIRE.victory_condition: Pick up item (Combat Action in contact) and exit from your table edge.

ELIMINATE.name: Eliminate
ELIMINATE.description: A random enemy is designated as the target. Kill them to Win. If the target would Bail, they instead remain for 1 more round (cannot move, can shoot/fight). If not killed that round, the mission fails.
ELIMINATE.placement_rules: Randomly designate one enemy as the target.
ELIMINATE.victory_condition: Kill the designated target. Target stays 1 extra round instead of Bailing.

SECURE.name: Secure
SECURE.description: End 2 consecutive rounds with crew members within 2 inches of the table center. Crew members with an enemy within 6 inches do not count toward securing.
SECURE.victory_condition: 2 consecutive round-ends with crew within 2 inches of center (enemies within 6 inches disqualify crew).

PROTECT.name: Protect
PROTECT.description: A VIP character (Reactions 1, Speed 4 inches, Combat Skill +0, Toughness 3) is unarmed and cannot initiate Brawls. VIP sets up 12 inches from center. If the VIP spends a full round within 3 inches of the center, the mission is Won. If achieved within the first 4 rounds, gain +2 credits.
PROTECT.placement_rules: VIP deploys 12 inches from center. VIP stats: Reactions 1, Speed 4, Combat +0, Toughness 3, unarmed.
PROTECT.victory_condition: VIP spends a full round within 3 inches of center. Bonus: +2 credits if achieved within first 4 rounds.

default_result.name: Fight Off
default_result.description: Standard engagement. Drive off all enemies.
